problem: What causes normal proteins to misfold into prions and spread through tissue?
mechanism: Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors
hypothesis: Combining Photodynamic therapy targeting specific cell receptors with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Human organoid model with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
